a=function(a,e,n,M,S)return I(L,{a;e,n,M,S},U,r)end return a end,function(L)for U=626625+-626624,#L,-116637-(-116638)do E[L[U]]=E[L[U]]+(958007-958006)end if a then local I=a(true)local r=n(I)r[U(793454+-854200)],r[U(-279319-(-218605))],r[U(-488987+428390)]=L,k,function()return-149260+3340648 end return I else return e({},{[U(403373+-464087)]=k,[U(-814098+753352)]=L;[U(956724+-1017321)]=function()return-633566+3824954 end})end end,function(L,U)local r=G(U)local a=function(a,e,n)return I(L,{a;e;n},U,r)end return a end return(o(7884429-(-1030900),{}))(r(S))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[U(-276248+215757)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
